nasb.text: Now the upper chambers were smaller because the galleries took more space away from them than from the lower and middle ones in the building.

esv.text: Now the upper chambers were narrower, for the galleries took more away from them than from the lower and middle chambers of the building.

cnv.text: 上層的房子最窄，因為上層的走廊所佔的地方，比下層和中層的為多。

ccb.text: 上层的厢房比下层和中层的窄，因为上层走廊占去较大的面积。
